research.status_summary: Actively hiring in a highly selective, no-open-listings mode — Midjourney's careers page states no formal positions are posted but explicitly invites exceptional candidates to reach out, with a focus on research and data engineering.
research.hiring_policy: Visa sponsorship confirmed (yes, per official careers page); Bay Area and London are preferred but remote work is accepted; no mention of EOR but the openness to remote suggests flexibility for the right candidate.
recent_news: V8.1 model released April 30, 2026 — described as Midjourney's fastest model ever, with 4–5x faster generation, HD 2K image output, improved prompt adherence, and Raw mode; V7 remains the default for most users.
Crossed $200M ARR as of March 2026 (reported by The Information) with ~40–100 employees and zero outside investors, yielding a stunning ~$5M revenue-per-employee ratio — 8x Apple's efficiency.

Meta partnership (Aug 2025) to license Midjourney's aesthetic technology for future Meta models; separately, Warner Bros. Discovery and Disney/Universal filed copyright infringement suits in mid-2025, creating ongoing legal overhang.

Secret hardware division active since Aug 2024, led by former Apple Vision Pro engineering manager; Midjourney office hours (Jan–Feb 2026) referenced real-time 3D research and mobile app plans — products still unannounced.
research.growth_signal: Revenue trajectory is steep ($50M → $200M → $300M → $500M projected across 2022–2025) and self-funded with no VC dilution; headcount appears to be quietly growing (Tracxn counts 192 employees as of Apr 2026 vs. the oft-cited ~40–100 figure), and the product is expanding from images into video, 3D, and hardware.
research.fit_for_lior: Midjourney is the canonical Creative-AI platform — building the frontier of image/video/world models with a tiny team and portfolio-first hiring — making it a near-perfect fit for a Creative AI / Product Analyst / Vibe Coder profile who can demo exceptional taste and output over credentials.
